title: AI vigilante trap snares alleged paedophile ex-teacher in France
summary_full: The 66-year-old handed himself in after an influencer used AI to pose as a 14-year-old girl and broadcast their conversation online.
summary_public: The 66-year-old handed himself in after an influencer used AI to pose as a 14-year-old girl and broadcast their conversation online.
